name: Riya Banerjee
title: Senior Data Engineer
summary: Software / data professional with 7.8 years of experience building data pipelines, backend systems, and analytics infrastructure. I'm a backend/data hybrid — Spark, Airflow, SQL warehouses are home territory; I'm building competence on the ML side. My toolkit is solid on the data engineering side — Python, SQL, Spark, Airflow, warehouse design — and I've completed a couple of self-directed ML projects (Kaggle competitions, side projects fine-tuning small models). Interested in transitioning toward more AI/ML-focused work, ideally at a company where I can leverage my existing data-infra skills while learning modern ML practice.

explainability.why_selected: 7.8 years experience in Senior Data Engineer with Weights & Biases, Sales, and Java. Strong recruiter responsiveness (64%), minor concern: 30-day notice.
explainability.recruiter_notes: Candidate has 7.8 years of experience and 8 skills. Notice period: 30 days. Expected salary: 26.8 LPA. Priority level: Medium.
